## Related Issues

## Type of Change

<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature / New MCP tool (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (adds or updates docs)
- [ ] 🛠️ Refactor/Chore (internal changes, test improvements)

## Checklist

<!-- Put an `x` in the boxes that apply. You can also fill these out after creating the PR. -->

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] My code follows the code style (black / ruff) of this project (`uv run ruff format .`).
- [ ] I have added tests to cover my changes (if applicable).
- [ ] All new and existing tests passed (`uv run pytest`).
- [ ] I added docstrings with Google-style formatting to new tool functions.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (e.g. `README.md` if I added new tools).
